title: Deep Stack Cash Play (200BB+)
description: Implied odds, 4-bet/5-bet lines, deep stack speculation
coreRule: Deep 200BB+: suited connectors/small pairs win through implied odds. Broadway dominated OOP. 4-bet bluffs grow, 5-bet ranges narrow.

decisions.description: Deep 200BB. CO opens 3x. Hero BTN 44. Action?

explanation.call: ✓ Set mine — deep implied odds 65-1. Auto-call BTN IP.
explanation.fold: Too tight. Deep stacks love small pairs.
explanation.default: 200BB+ small pair IP = always call. Implied odds massive.

decisions.description: 250BB deep. CO open, BTN squeeze to 11bb. Hero BB 98s. Action?

explanation.fold: ✓ BB OOP vs squeeze — realization суффers. Fold default.
explanation.call: Close call если implied odds (deep + suited). Mixed OK.
explanation.4bet: Rare bluff combo — 98s has SC equity.
explanation.default: Deep BB vs squeeze OOP — fold marginal. 98s on bubble of GTO.

decisions.description: 300BB. Hero HJ opened 3x with AJo. CO 3-bets to 11bb. Action?

explanation.fold: ✓ 300BB AJo OOP vs 3-bet = dominated. Realization terrible.
explanation.call: Bad leak. Deep OOP dominated = lose stacks fast.
explanation.default: Deeper = tighter defense OOP vs 3-bet с broadway.

decisions.description: 200BB. Hero BTN opened 2.5x A4s. CO 3-bets to 11bb. Action?

explanation.call: ✓ A4s deep IP = great call. Plays well postflop, nut FD, implied odds.
explanation.4bet: Primary 4-bet bluff — blocker A + wheel draws. Mixed strategy.
explanation.default: Deep A4s-A5s — call or 4-bet bluff. IP realization high.

decisions.description: 200BB. Hero BTN 4-bet KK to 26bb. CO 5-bets to 60bb. Action?

explanation.call: ✓ 200BB KK vs 5-bet — call to see flop. Avoid variance vs AA.
explanation.shove: Some freq — KK is close to top of 4-bet range.
explanation.default: Deep 5-bet pot — KK call, evaluate flop. АА narrow range шансы high.

decisions.description: 200BB. BTN open AK, BB called. Flop K-7-4 rainbow. BB checks. Sizing?

explanation.bet: ✓ 33% cbet deep — keep SPR manageable, get thin value.
explanation.default: Deep stacks = smaller cbets. 33% default. Avoid building huge pots OOP villain.
